name: Breads in Jars: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place a baking sheet on the middle rack and remove the top rack from the oven.
3. Wash jars, lids, and rings in hot soapy water. Drain, dry, and cool them to room temperature.
4. Generously prepare the inside of the jars with margarine.
5. To prepare the batter, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, and cinnamon in a mixing bowl.
6. In another mixing bowl, combine margarine, water, cocoa powder, buttermilk, egg white, and vanilla.
7. Divide the batter among the 3 jars (slightly less than half full).
8. Carefully wipe rims clean, then place the jars on the baking sheet in the center of the oven.
9. Bake for 40 minutes. Keep lids in hot water until used.
10. When cakes are done, remove jars from the oven one at a time as they are hot.
11. If rims need cleaning, use a moistened paper towel.
12. Carefully put lids and rings in place, then screw tops on tightly shut.
13. Place jars on a wire rack; they will seal as they cool.
14. Once jars are cool, decorate with round pieces of cloth and then glue on flowers, ribbons, etc., on the lid, ring, and side of the jar.
15. Unscrew the ring (the lid should be sealed by now) and place a few cotton balls on top of the lid to make it puffy. Then place a piece of cloth about 3 inches larger than the lid on top and screw the ring back on. Decorate as desired (e.g., using pinking shears).
